Author: Raznaak
Description: -Lore: One morning, you find a small device in the engineering section of the station, with a small screen, a keyboard and a standard memory connector, with the letters "BRA" stenciled on the back. Right now it seems empty of programmed modules, but looking a bit in the pile of junk, you find a memory stick with "CaninePussy" written on it, and after plugging it and fiddling a bit with the controls, you notice that your fellow Canine prisoners suddenly all have animalistic pussies instead of humanoid ones. Surprisingly, noone seems to notice the difference but you... Are... are you able to alter reality with this device? You must find other modules, stat!  -Description: This is what I managed to hack together to make in-game options for mods possible, since having multiple versions of the same mod for different options is fucking annoying for the modders and for the users, and it's basically impossible to add custom options to the base game Options without releasing a custom build. Alone, this mod does nothing, but with mods using compatible scene files, more options are going to get added dynamically, for the users they just need to have this mod and the (future) compatible mods will add themselves to the options available (check the pictures for an example with the Canine Pussy mod). Right now only text boxes and scene buttons can be used to change mods, as I still haven't managed to include checkboxes and dropdown lists, but perhaps I'll manage one day.  For modders, check all the files in the following Canine Pussy mod to understand how to make one for your mod, I added comments to help you, and I will happily answer questions, it's both not hard and a bit finicky... What's important is using flags in your module.gd and you MUST have a [YourMod]/Scenes/ModsOptionsScenes folder with the scene inside for it to register. You don't have to name the scene as I did, but it will help with what shows in game.  [url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Alexofp/BDCCMods/main/previews/ModsOptions.png]Click for Preview[/url]

[b][color=red]**Warning!**[/color][/b] Old clothes will be deleted, you can save them and change the values in the save file using Notepad++: 1. Call the search (Ctrl+F), 2. Description: First quick draft of something that I wanted for a long time (and I'm sure I'm far from the only one): to remove an NPC from the game after an encounter, without needing to go through the habitual hassle. The dialogs are practically nonexistent right now and you always succeed, but I plan to add to this mod eventually (I just wanted to share it right now for those who want something like that, then expand it as I get used with the systems I'm not yet used to):  The next versions will be taking into account your relevant reputation versus theirs (Alpha and Inmate/Staff) to make things have more or less chance to work depending on the difference, the relation between you two (an Ally wouldn't want to lose you and a Nemesis would want to take revenge, people inbetween care less), and you'd have more chance to make them flee after you've won a fight than just by talking. Author: keerifox
Description: Adds an alternate interaction upon meeting a guard, engineer or a nurse in an off-limits cell. In this diverging outcome, the trespassing inmate is not immediately detected, and is presented with an opportunity to sneak up on staff. Occasionally, while exploring the space prison, you may also find yourself on the receiving end of this encounter.  - Wearing loud restraints increases the detection rate. On the other paw, wearing staff uniform may trick pawns that have low perception.  - Explicit interactions require successfully enticing the creature into submission. Failing that, available options are limited to playful teasing (which is valid).  - You may edit the files to sidestep consent play, it's fiction and I'm not here to police it. Do note that it's a core mechanic and an intended way to experience the mod.  - There are some branching paths as well as modular dialogues, with the hope to keep each encounter a little more distinct and tailored to some of the character attributes.  Compatibility `/Game/InteractionSystem/Interactions/CaughtOffLimits.gd` is overridden to allow a detour into the alternate interaction, and to include two methods to compute its chances. Any other file is a new addition and shouldn't cause conflicts as long as the filenames are unique. Author: Cheeseball
Description: Keyholders Galore is a small tweak mod that makes SlutLocks function the same way as the standard keyholder lock.  Right now, TightLocks are still using their original, item-based behavior. Changing them cleanly to a keyholder-style system is a bit above this mod’s current scope, but anyone who knows how to do it is very welcome to tinker with the files or send instructions so it can be integrated in a future update.  Special thanks to Kaio (creator of KeysMod) for allowing the use of their mod as a base template for this project!  Current Features - SlutLocks now behave like keyholder locks (single NPC keyholder logic). - SlutLock is renamed to Submission Lock.  Planned Features - Rework TightLocks to use keyholder style functionality instead of purely item-based unlocking. - Add options for players to adjust the chance of specific smart locks appearing, instead of the current forced keyholder lock behavior. - Deeper integration and compatibility improvements with KeysMod. - Allow for the option to have multiple keyholders for one keyholder lock (ex: Require keys from 3 NPCs to unlock a keyholder lock)

Author: bringlebangul
Description: The actions to displace clothes such as 'open shirt' can now be applied by selecting a worn item in the inventory screen. This applies to all uniforms & underwear (that you can get without cheats). Each action has new visuals to go along with it. Clothing items which share textures - like 'sporty' items - have been given their own appearance (e.g. stripes), to better distinguish them.  Features: -Worn clothing items can now be shifted to expose chest or privates. Clothing state is managed by selecting equipped items from the inventory. -This hooks into the battle tease actions, so exhibitionist requirements and exp apply. -Adds new models for 'lace' and 'sporty' variants of undergarments to better distinguish them. -Adds new models for inmate uniforms and underwear for the shifted aside states. -Clothing that is damaged enough to expose privates can't be shifted, because it's pointless and also cuts down the number of model states I have to make. -Compatible with 'MoreUniforms' uniforms. -NPC doms have a 10% chance to shift clothing instead of removing it during sex. -Can shift clothes during sex, may lead to strange-looking graphics in some positions (haven't tested all)  Changelog 1.4: -Hard-coded exceptions for MoreUniforms shirtonly and shortsonly uniforms, which uniquely use the 'body' slot but use the itemstate for underwear. -CheckRemoved now checks if the item is removed or covers any bodyparts, so doms shouldn't get mad if you shift instead of remove an item when ordered. -Should fix npcs getting stuck in infinite loop when trying to undress. -Added compatibility for MoreUniforms cowprint underwear.  Planned: Come up with some NPC logic that decides when to remove and when to shift aside. Maybe add a reduced effect of the exhibitionist perks when fully exposed but not nude?

I wanted to have more than just the Canines to have access to the Canine Pussy, without manually entering EACH species, but before FoxLib it would have been way too difficult to do so... I had to limit it to only these species as there are way too many species mods to reasonably include all of them, and there's already quite a lot canine-related species, but your character can have one no matter the species.  Any character previously with a canine pussy won't have any problems with the new version, don't delete them (but delete the old mod version, of course). A huge thanks to @Fox2Code, the FoxLib not only actually made this version possible, but the Mod Helper cut the time required to make this by a considerable amount (I shudder at how long it would have taken otherwise with all the testing needed...). Author: Raznaak
Description: [b]Required mod: FoxLib, this is mandatory!!![/b] Description: This adds the Equine Pussy in the vagina parts available. There's no actual visible parts, but the descriptions are different, and it naturally handles bigger volumes and is easier to fit things in. If you find any bug of course notify me, and I'm listening to suggestions.  Same changes as the Canine pussy, go see it for the details.  Important Note: If a species has access to both the Canine and the Equine pussies (nominally the Hellhound and the Laquine as of right now), with how the code behind the percentages works it's better if you use one or the other (or both at 100% for a 50/50 chance ultimately).  If you want to do some maths and perfectly balance them, the formula for each of my mod is chance = (100/(100-percentage))-1, but if the percentage is 100% the chance becomes 99,999,999,999 because of how the weighted options work in the game... So, with the normal vagina's chance being always 1, add the chance of all three and look at the chance compared to the total.  Like, if you put one of them at 100% and the other at 50%, the 50% will be mostly ignored (1 chances in a hundred billions...), if you put both at 50% the chances are going to be 33% chance of each of the three available vaginas right now (normal at 1, canine at 1, and equine at 1, so 1 chance on three for each of them), at 75% chance both there's 14% chance of the normal vagina still spawning (normal at 1, canine at 3, equine at 3), if you put 95% in canine and 25% in the other, the canine with have 19 chances (93% real chance), the equine 0.333 chances (1.6% real chance...) and the normal 1 (5% real chance), etc.  Perhaps I'll make them take the other pussies into account, but for now only two species are affected so just choose one pussy or the other, or put them both at 100% for a 50/50 chance...
